title: Grupo Erik Metal Water Bottle 500ml / 17oz - Hokusai | Hot and Cold Water Bottle Stainless Steel, Cute Travel Bottles Gym | Japanese Art Gifts Under 20 Pounds
features: 500ml Water Bottle - Inspired by the iconic artwork of Hokusai The Great Wave off Kanagawa, this insulated water bottle is a masterpiece in itself, blending tradition and functionality.
Water Bottle Stainless Steel - Made from high-quality stainless steel, this drinks bottle is resistant to impacts and corrosion, ensuring long-lasting use. BPA free water bottle.
Double-wall Insulation - Insulated water bottles keep your drinks hot for up to 12 hours and cold for up to 24 hours, making it perfect for any season.
Leakproof Water Bottle - Water bottle metal with a capacity of 500 ml / 17 oz has a wooden-finished, hermetically sealed cap with engraved Kokonote brand logo and a metal handle for easy carrying.

Creating Your Story - Grupo Erik creates 100% official licensed stationery and merchandise inspired by the world’s most loved brands. Combining functionality and durability, our products are designed to be part of your daily life.
description: • Water bottles are an everyday necessity. We are well aware of the importance of keeping ourselves hydrated all the time, especially when we are surrounded by piles of work. What works best in such times is a handy water bottle! • Steel water bottles are not only efficient, they also drive away the need of plastic which is hazardous to health. These are eco-friendly, durable and can be used for a long time. • Grupo Erik´s premium insulated bottles are made from the highest grade of stainless steel. Our water bottles will keep your water cold for the full 24 hours and your coffee or tea toasty for 12. They'll stay polished and scratch-free for as long as possible. • All our bottles are 100% BPA free, food-safe and leak proof. No surprise nasties, accidental spillage or icky chemicals here. • Stainless steel is lauded for its durability and is also one of the safest materials used in the kitchen. This bottle is therefore safe, sturdy, leakage proof and efficient at storing your beverages hot or cold for longer periods of time. A unique lid that makes pouring completely hassle-free and spill-free. Tough & durable water bottle are designed to last a lifetime.
